vocab.meaning: đi sâu vào những chi tiết phức tạp
vocab.example: If I had the chance, I would love to delve into the intricacies of behavioral economics to understand why people make irrational choices.

vocab.meaning: một lĩnh vực đang phát triển nhanh chóng
vocab.example: Neurotechnology is a burgeoning field that I am incredibly eager to explore in my postgraduate studies.

vocab.meaning: sự thông thạo về mặt kỹ thuật
vocab.example: I hope to gain a high level of technical proficiency in data science to help businesses optimize their decision-making processes.

vocab.meaning: sự theo đuổi con đường học thuật
vocab.example: My ultimate academic pursuit would be a PhD in sustainable urban planning to address the issues of modern city life.

vocab.meaning: khái niệm hóa các ý tưởng phức tạp
vocab.example: Studying abstract mathematics would challenge me to conceptualize complex ideas that are not easily visible in the physical world.
I believe that studying liberal arts provides a well-rounded education that is essential for personal growth.

vocab.meaning: sự hướng dẫn/truyền nghề thực tế
vocab.example: I am looking for a program that offers hands-on mentorship from industry experts in the field of digital marketing.

vocab.meaning: có định hướng nghề nghiệp thực tế
vocab.example: I might opt for a course that is more vocationally oriented, focusing specifically on culinary arts and hospitality management.

vocab.meaning: cơ sở vật chất hiện đại nhất
vocab.example: I would be thrilled to study molecular biology at a university that boasts state-of-the-art facilities for genetic research.

vocab.meaning: sự thăng tiến trong sự nghiệp
vocab.example: Taking a specialized course in project management is vital for my long-term career advancement within the tech industry.
